title: BIG4 Karuah Jetty Holiday Park
description: Airy cabins & bungalows, plus campsites, in a relaxed resort with an outdoor pool & a tennis court.
address: 88 Holdom Rd, Karuah NSW 2324, Australia
hotelDescription:
Set on the banks of the Karuah River at the edge of town, this laid-back resort is 12 km from Medowie Nature Reserve, 10 km from Wallaroo State Forest and 5 km from the A1 national highway.
 The airy, air-conditioned cabins feature kitchens, flat-screen TVs and living areas, plus shower-only bathrooms and private verandahs. Upgraded bungalows sleep up to 10 people.
 Parking is included. Other amenities consist of an outdoor pool, a playground, and a tennis court, plus a game room and BBQs. Kayak and bike rentals are available, as are RV and campsites.

title: Thou walla Sunset Retreat
description: Colourful cottages and villas with full kitchens, decks and free Wi-Fi, plus an outdoor pool.
address: 2 Ridgeway Ave, Soldiers Point NSW 2317, Australia
hotelDescription:
A 1-minute walk from Soldiers Point Marina, this adults-only cottage resort is also 5 km from Salamander Bay beach and 11 km from Moonshadow Cruises, which offers dolphin- and whale-watching tours.
 Featuring open-plan lounge and dining areas with full kitchens, the colourful cottages and villas come with free Wi-Fi, air-conditioning and furnished decks. Upgraded villas add ocean views or whirlpool baths.
 The florid tropical grounds feature a pool, BBQ areas and a tennis court.
